settings.subtitle: More is more. Your scent is fireworks, full chorus, every note turned to ten — and somehow it works.

settings.content: You don't dilute. The bigger feeling, the brighter colour, the louder room. You came to live in technicolour.
Velvet on velvet, gold on gold, opera at noon. Fragrance as celebration with no occasion required.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Maximalist commands compositions with no shy notes — tuberose, oud, smoke, spice, candied florals, deep amber. Scents that fill the doorway, the staircase, the elevator. Nothing whispered. Everything sung.

settings.title: The | Maximalist's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes turned all the way up.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
